meta.title: Ron Work's
meta.description: Portfolio website of Ronaldo Jr. Dialino Jr. featuring services, projects, tools, and professional experience.

hero.title:
Hey There,
I’m Ron
hero.lead: I’m here to help. As a Virtual Assistant, I keep things organized, accurate, and moving fast—so you don’t have to worry!

knownFor.text: Reliable and consistent — I respect your deadlines
Quick learner — I pick things up fast and stay adaptable
Organized and proactive — I stay ahead so you don’t have to
Honest, flexible, and a real team player

items.title: Administrative Assistant & Records Management Officer
items.summary: Billing and Claims Department, Government Hospital. Focused on providing comprehensive administrative support with expertise in records management, document control, and data entry.
bullets: Assist with administrative tasks such as scheduling meetings, preparing agendas, and documenting minutes
Organize, manage, and maintain departmental documents and records in compliance with hospital policies
Process denied claims by identifying reasons for denial and facilitating timely resubmission
Implement efficient document control and records management procedures

items.title: Virtual Assistant
items.summary: Supported customer service, CRM maintenance, GIS mapping, soil-test processing, and day-to-day operations for a lawn care company.
bullets: Updated CRM records with accurate notes
Created GIS lawn maps for service planning

items.title: Data Research Analyst & SEO Specialist
items.summary: Handled research, e-commerce operations support, SEO-focused updates, data cleanup, and reporting tasks for client accounts.
bullets: Helped optimize online listings and content

items.title: IT Support Specialist / Technician
items.summary: Provided hardware and software troubleshooting, OS installation, maintenance, upgrades, and technical support for small businesses and individual clients.

items.title: Sports Game Indexer & Quality Analyst
items.summary: Tagged and reviewed sports footage with strong accuracy, consistency, and quality control for data processing workflows.
bullets: Indexed game events frame by frame

items.quote: Ron is incredibly reliable and detail-oriented. His work on our CRM and customer communications has been outstanding.

items.quote: Excellent administrative support. Ron keeps our department running smoothly and never misses a deadline.
